reference: You seem to have a problem with anal fissures. You should try laxatives and a diet rich in fiber to avoid straining during bowel movements. Also, you can apply lignocaine gel with a steroid for pain relief. A sitz bath may also help you. Avoid spicy food. Start some exercises if you have a sedentary lifestyle. The back pain may also subside subsequently. Low-dose painkillers along with back strengthening exercises are all that you require at present.
text: You seem to have a problem with anal fissures. You should try laxatives and a diet rich in fiber to avoid straining during bowel movements. Also, you can apply liquid cane gel with a steroid for pain relief. A sitz bath may also help you. Avoid spicy food. Start some exercises if you have a sedentary lifestyle. The back pain may also subside subsequently. Low-dose painkillers along with back-strengthening exercises are all that you require at present.
